title: SUB GEOGRAPHY TOPIC 1 CYCLONE AND OCEAN CURRENTS 2 INDI

questions.question: 1. Which country has the largest land border with India? / भारत के साथ किस देश की सबसे लंबी थलीय सीमा है?
questions.explanation: Bangladesh shares the longest border of 4096.7 km with India.

questions.question: 2. What is the North-South extent of India? / भारत का उत्तर-दक्षिण विस्तार कितना है?
questions.explanation: The North-South extent of India is 3214 km, while East-West is 2933 km.

questions.question: 3. Which latitude passes through the center of India? / कौन सा अक्षांश भारत के मध्य से गुजरता है?
questions.explanation: The Tropic of Cancer (23°30'N) passes through 8 Indian states.

questions.question: 4. Which state has the longest coastline in India? / भारत में किस राज्य की तटरेखा सबसे लंबी है?
questions.explanation: Gujarat has the longest coastline among states, measuring 2,340.62 km.

questions.question: 5. Where do the Tropic of Cancer and IST meridian meet? / कर्क रेखा और भारतीय मानक समय रेखा कहाँ मिलते हैं?
questions.explanation: They intersect at Korea district (Baikunthpur) in Chhattisgarh.

questions.question: 6. What is the southernmost point of mainland India? / भारत की मुख्य भूमि का सबसे दक्षिणी बिंदु कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Kanyakumari is the southernmost point of the mainland in Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: 7. Which state is surrounded by Bangladesh on three sides? / कौन सा राज्य तीन ओर से बांग्लादेश से घिरा हुआ है?
questions.explanation: Tripura is surrounded by Bangladesh from three sides.

questions.question: 8. The McMohan Line separates India from which country? / मैकमोहन रेखा भारत को किस देश से अलग करती है?
questions.explanation: The McMohan Line defines the boundary in the eastern sector between India and China.

questions.question: 9. What is the IST's time difference from GMT? / भारतीय मानक समय (IST) का GMT से क्या अंतर है?
options: 5 hours 30 mins behind / 5 घंटे 30 मिनट पीछे
5 hours 30 mins ahead / 5 घंटे 30 मिनट आगे
questions.explanation: Indian Standard Time is 5 hours and 30 minutes ahead of Greenwich Mean Time.

questions.question: 10. Which is the smallest state in India by area? / क्षेत्रफल के हिसाब से भारत का सबसे छोटा राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Rajasthan is the largest state while Goa is the smallest by area.

questions.question: 11. The Radcliffe Line is the boundary between India and? / रेडक्लिफ रेखा भारत और किसके बीच की सीमा है?
questions.explanation: Sir Cyril Radcliffe drew the boundary line between India and Pakistan.

questions.question: 12. Which water body separates India and Sri Lanka? / भारत और श्रीलंका को कौन सा जल निकाय अलग करता है?
options: Gulf of Khambhat / खंभात की खाड़ी
questions.explanation: Palk Strait and Gulf of Mannar separate India from Sri Lanka.

questions.question: 13. Which state shares a border with only one state (West Bengal)? / कौन सा राज्य केवल एक राज्य (पश्चिम बंगाल) के साथ सीमा साझा करता है?
questions.explanation: Sikkim shares its only domestic border with West Bengal.

questions.question: 14. What is the easternmost point of India? / भारत का सबसे पूर्वी बिंदु कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Kibithu in Arunachal Pradesh is the easternmost point of India.

questions.question: 15. India occupies what percentage of the world's area? / भारत विश्व के क्षेत्रफल का कितना प्रतिशत घेरता है?
questions.explanation: India occupies 2.4% of the world's land area but holds 17.7% of the population.

questions.question: 16. Which UT is the largest by area? / क्षेत्रफल के हिसाब से सबसे बड़ा केंद्र शासित प्रदेश कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Ladakh is the largest Union Territory while Lakshadweep is the smallest.

questions.question: 17. Which force guards the India-China border? / भारत-चीन सीमा की रक्षा कौन सा बल करता है?
questions.explanation: Indo-Tibetan Border Police (ITBP) guards the border with China.

questions.question: 18. What is India's territorial sea limit from the coast? / तट से भारत की क्षेत्रीय समुद्री सीमा क्या है?
questions.explanation: India's territorial limit extends up to 12 nautical miles (approx 22 km).

questions.question: 19. Which city is the most populous UT in India? / भारत का सबसे अधिक जनसंख्या वाला केंद्र शासित प्रदेश कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Delhi is the most populous UT, whereas Lakshadweep is the least.

questions.question: 20. The Durand Line separates India from? / डूरंड रेखा भारत को किससे अलग करती है?
questions.explanation: The border between India (Ladakh) and Afghanistan is called the Durand Line.

questions.question: 21. Which state shares borders with three countries (Nepal, Bhutan, China)? / कौन सा राज्य तीन देशों (नेपाल, भूटान, चीन) के साथ सीमा साझा करता है?
questions.explanation: Sikkim shares international borders with Nepal, Bhutan, and China.

questions.question: 22. India is ranked what in terms of world area? / विश्व क्षेत्रफल के मामले में भारत का कौन सा स्थान है?
questions.explanation: India is the 7th largest country after Russia, Canada, China, USA, Brazil, and Australia.

questions.question: 23. Which state has the least population in India? / भारत में सबसे कम जनसंख्या वाला राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Uttar Pradesh is the most populous state while Sikkim is the least populous.

questions.question: 24. How many states does the Tropic of Cancer pass through? / कर्क रेखा कितने राज्यों से होकर गुजरती है?
questions.explanation: It passes through Gujarat, Rajasthan, MP, Chhattisgarh, Jharkhand, WB, Tripura, and Mizoram.

questions.question: 25. The Samjhauta Express runs between India and? / समझौता एक्सप्रेस भारत और किसके बीच चलती है?
questions.explanation: Samjhauta Express was started between India and Pakistan following the 1976 Shimla Agreement.

questions.question: 26. Which state does NOT share a border with Myanmar? / कौन सा राज्य म्यांमार के साथ सीमा साझा नहीं करता है?
questions.explanation: Arunachal, Nagaland, Manipur, and Mizoram share borders with Myanmar.

questions.question: 27. What is the total land border length of India? / भारत की कुल थलीय सीमा की लंबाई कितनी है?
questions.explanation: The total land border area of India is approximately 15,106.7 km.

questions.question: 28. Which meridian is taken as the Standard Meridian for IST? / किस देशांतर को IST के लिए मानक मध्याह्न रेखा माना गया है?
questions.explanation: The 82.30° E longitude is the Standard Meridian passing through Mirzapur, UP.

questions.question: 29. Palk Bay is located above which gulf? / पाक खाड़ी किस खाड़ी के ऊपर स्थित है?
options: Gulf of Mexico / मैक्सिको की खाड़ी
Gulf of Aden / अदन की खाड़ी
Gulf of Kutch / कच्छ की खाड़ी
Gulf of Mannar / मन्नार की खाड़ी
questions.explanation: Palk Bay is located to the north of the Gulf of Mannar near Sri Lanka.

questions.question: 30. Which is the largest bay in the world? / विश्व की सबसे बड़ी खाड़ी (Bay) कौन सी है?
options: Bay of Bengal / बंगाल की खाड़ी
Gulf of Mexico / मैक्सिको की खाड़ी
Bay of Biscay / बिस्के की खाड़ी
questions.explanation: The Bay of Bengal is the largest bay, while the Gulf of Mexico is the largest gulf.

questions.question: 1. What is the minimum sea surface temperature required for cyclone formation? / चक्रवात बनने के लिए समुद्र की सतह का न्यूनतम तापमान कितना होना चाहिए?
questions.explanation: A sea surface temperature of 27° C or higher is a favorable condition for cyclone formation.

questions.question: 2. In which direction do cyclones rotate in the Northern Hemisphere? / उत्तरी गोलार्ध में चक्रवात किस दिशा में घूमते हैं?
questions.explanation: Cyclones rotate anti-clockwise in the Northern Hemisphere and clockwise in the Southern Hemisphere.

questions.question: 3. What is the calm, clear center of a tropical cyclone called? / उष्णकटिबंधीय चक्रवात के शांत और स्पष्ट केंद्र को क्या कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: The "Eye" is a region of mostly calm weather at the center of strong tropical cyclones.

questions.question: 4. Cyclones are known as "Typhoons" in which region? / किस क्षेत्र में चक्रवातों को "टाइफून" के नाम से जाना जाता है?
options: South China Sea / दक्षिण चीन सागर
questions.explanation: Cyclones are called Typhoons in the South China Sea and Hurricanes in the Atlantic.

questions.question: 5. Which force is essential for the spinning of a cyclone? / चक्रवात के घूमने के लिए कौन सा बल आवश्यक है?
questions.explanation: The Coriolis force, caused by Earth's rotation, is necessary for the air to spin into a cyclone.

questions.question: 6. What are cyclones called in Western Australia? / पश्चिमी ऑस्ट्रेलिया में चक्रवातों को क्या कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: In Western Australia, tropical cyclones are locally referred to as Willy-Willies.

questions.question: 7. What is the main cause of surface ocean currents? / सतही महासागरीय धाराओं का मुख्य कारण क्या है?
options: Underwater volcanoes / पानी के नीचे ज्वालामुखी
questions.explanation: Surface currents are primarily driven by planetary winds like Trade winds and Westerlies.

questions.question: 8. Which of the following is a Warm Ocean Current? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी एक गर्म महासागरीय धारा है?
questions.explanation: Gulf Stream is a powerful warm ocean current in the North Atlantic Ocean.

questions.question: 9. Cold ocean currents generally move from? / ठंडी महासागरीय धाराएँ आमतौर पर कहाँ से कहाँ की ओर चलती हैं?
options: East to West / पूर्व से पश्चिम
Poles to Equator / ध्रुवों से भूमध्य रेखा की ओर
West to East / पश्चिम से पूर्व
Equator to Poles / भूमध्य रेखा से ध्रुवों की ओर
questions.explanation: Cold water moves from the high-latitude polar regions toward the lower-latitude equator.

questions.question: 10. Which point in the sea sees a sudden decline in temperature? / समुद्र में किस बिंदु पर तापमान में अचानक गिरावट आती है?
questions.explanation: Thermocline is the layer where temperature decreases rapidly with increasing depth.

questions.question: 11. What is "Halocline" related to in oceanography? / समुद्र विज्ञान में "हैलोक्लाइन" किससे संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Halocline is the point below which salinity increases rapidly in the sea.

questions.question: 12. Which current is also known as the "Humboldt Current"? / किस धारा को "हम्बोल्ट धारा" के नाम से भी जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: The Peru Current is a cold, low-salinity ocean current named after Alexander von Humboldt.

questions.question: 13. The meeting of warm and cold currents creates best zones for? / गर्म और ठंडी धाराओं के मिलने से किसके लिए सबसे अच्छे क्षेत्र बनते हैं?
questions.explanation: The meeting of warm and cold currents creates rich fishing grounds due to plankton growth.

questions.question: 14. Which cold current contributes to the Namib Desert's formation? / कौन सी ठंडी धारा नामीब मरुस्थल के निर्माण में योगदान देती है?
questions.explanation: The cold Benguela current creates arid conditions leading to the Namib desert in Africa.

questions.question: 15. "Baguios" is the name for cyclones in which country? / "बागुलोज" किस देश में चक्रवातों का नाम है?
questions.explanation: In the Philippines, tropical cyclones are locally called Baguios.

questions.question: 16. Which current flows along the coast of Japan? / जापान के तट के साथ कौन सी धारा बहती है?
questions.explanation: Kuroshio is a warm current in the western North Pacific Ocean near Japan.

questions.question: 17. Ocean currents are influenced by which secondary factor? / महासागरीय धाराएं किस माध्यमिक कारक से प्रभावित होती हैं?
questions.explanation: Factors like Gravity, Coriolis Force, and Coastlines influence the path of ocean currents.

questions.question: 18. What kind of weather is created where warm and cold currents meet? / जहाँ गर्म और ठंडी धाराएँ मिलती हैं, वहाँ किस प्रकार का मौसम बनता है?
questions.explanation: The mixing of warm and cold air masses over these currents results in heavy fog.

questions.question: 19. Which current is found in the Indian Ocean? / हिंद महासागर में कौन सी धारा पाई जाती है?
questions.explanation: Mozambique and Agulhas are significant warm currents in the Indian Ocean.

questions.question: 20. What causes desertification on the west coast of continents? / महाद्वीपों के पश्चिमी तट पर मरुस्थलीकरण का क्या कारण है?
questions.explanation: Cold currents make air cooler and less able to hold moisture, forming coastal deserts.

questions.question: 21. Which of the following is a cold current of the Atlantic Ocean? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी अटलांटिक महासागर की एक ठंडी धारा है?
questions.explanation: The Labrador Current is a cold current flowing from the Arctic Ocean into the Atlantic.

questions.question: 22. Where do the cyclones called "Hurricanes" occur? / "हरिकेन" नामक चक्रवात कहाँ आते हैं?
questions.explanation: Tropical cyclones in the Atlantic and North-Eastern Pacific are called Hurricanes.

questions.question: 23. What happens to air as it rises during cyclone formation? / चक्रवात बनने के दौरान हवा के ऊपर उठने पर क्या होता है?
questions.explanation: Rising warm air creates a low-pressure area that initiates the cyclone's spin.

questions.question: 24. Which current is a cold current in the Pacific Ocean? / प्रशांत महासागर में कौन सी एक ठंडी धारा है?
questions.explanation: The California current is a cold Pacific Ocean current moving south along North America.

questions.question: 25. The "Agulhas Current" is found in which ocean? / "अगुलहास धारा" किस महासागर में पाई जाती है?
questions.explanation: The Agulhas Current is a warm western boundary current of the Indian Ocean.

questions.question: 26. Which name is used for cyclones in Japan? / जापान में चक्रवातों के लिए किस नाम का उपयोग किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: In Japan and East Asia, these storms are commonly called Typhoons.

questions.question: 27. What do we call the rotating mass of air with heavy rains? / भारी बारिश के साथ घूमने वाली हवा के पुंज को हम क्या कहते हैं?
questions.explanation: A cyclone is a large system of winds rotating around a center of low atmospheric pressure.

questions.question: 28. Which current is the cold counterpart to the Kuroshio current? / क्यूरोशियो धारा का ठंडा समकक्ष कौन सी धारा है?
questions.explanation: Oya Siwo is a cold subarctic ocean current that meets the warm Kuroshio current.

questions.question: 29. What is the direction of warm water movement? / गर्म पानी की गति की दिशा क्या होती है?
options: Equator to Poles / भूमध्य रेखा से ध्रुवों की ओर
West to East only / केवल पश्चिम से पूर्व
North to South only / केवल उत्तर से दक्षिण
Poles to Equator / ध्रुवों से भूमध्य रेखा की ओर
questions.explanation: Warm water generally flows from the warmer equatorial regions toward the colder poles.

questions.question: 30. Which ocean current flows near the coast of Brazil? / ब्राजील के तट के पास कौन सी महासागरीय धारा बहती है?
questions.explanation: The Brazil Current is a warm current that flows south along the Brazilian coast.
